title: 1 step DFU - Content of the Software Update tab when there is update available for Earbuds and Charge Case
scenario: Software Update tab displays current and available firmware versions, release notes, individual Update buttons for earbuds and charge case, and an Update All button when updates are available for both components
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure Bluetooth is enabled and the Poly earbuds + charge case are connected.
Navigate to Device Settings → [Connected Device Name].
Verify that firmware updates are available for both earbuds and the charge case (simulate or wait for server check).
Observe the Software Update tab content.
expected: The Software Update tab displays: current firmware version and available firmware version for the earbuds, current firmware version and available firmware version for the charge case, release notes for each update, an individual "Update" button for the earbuds, an individual "Update" button for the charge case, and an additional "Update All" button.
